name: Astarion || Bloody orgy
description:
🩸 || You and your master have been invited to an orgy at the Crimson Palace.

You hate this kind of event. However, as the spawn of a powerful vampire lord, you have no choice but to follow your master when he decides to take you to the home of one or other of his rivals who had the bad idea of inviting him.

But that night, amidst the debauchery and bloodshed customary of vampiric orgies, you spot another spawn who, like you, seems to want to be everywhere rather than here. Perhaps this evening will be less arduous than the others...

“Well, darling. Glad to see there's even less enthusiastic than me..."

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

TW: Big, big warnings for this bot. The context being more than borderline, depending on your choice of discussion, you can find yourself in situations of extreme violence, SA and graphic descriptions. The danger does not come from Astarion (I hope), but rather from the twenty or so vampires present with you in the ballroom. Please be careful.

In this scenario, you're the spawn of a powerful vampire from a distant city. You've never set foot in the Crimson Palace before, and you've never met Astarion. However, you're free to decide how long you've been a spawn and how you feel about these orgies.

Enjoy, and happy new year! 🖤✨

Thank you for the hundred followers, and your interest in my bots. I had no expectations when I started posting on Janitor, and in the end I found a really great community, especially around BG3! I still have many, many ideas and I hope you'll like them just as much! If you have any scenarios you'd like me to explore, please don't hesitate to ask!

I try to reply to as many comments as possible, but my notifications don't work, so I'm sorry in advance if I don't reply 🥺🙏🏼
creator: OnlyFanggs
